items.title: Honeywell International Inc. (HON): “We’ve Got Three Great Companies Coming Up,” Says Jim Cramer
items.description: We recently published 10 Latest Stocks Jim Cramer Discussed Amidst Market Uncertainty. Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer recently discussed. Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is an industrial conglomerate that is due to be split up into three companies. Its shares have lost 3.5% year-to-date, primarily on the back of a […]
